mapper.select: SELECT CATEGORY_ID AS categoryId, FK_PARENT_ID AS fkParentId, CATEGORY_NAME AS categoryName, DEPTH AS depth FROM TBL_JOB_CATEGORY WHERE DEPTH = 1 ORDER BY CATEGORY_NAME ASC
SELECT SKILL_CATEGORY_ID AS skillCategoryId, CATEGORY_NAME AS categoryName FROM TBL_SKILL_CATEGORY ORDER BY SKILL_CATEGORY_ID ASC
SELECT SKILL_ID AS skillId, FK_SKILL_CATEGORY_ID AS fkSkillCategoryId, SKILL_NAME AS skillName FROM TBL_SKILL ORDER BY FK_SKILL_CATEGORY_ID ASC, SKILL_NAME ASC

SELECT r.RESUME_ID AS resumeId, r.FK_MEMBERID AS memberId, m.NAME AS name, r.TITLE AS resumeTitle, r.FK_CATEGORY_ID AS categoryId, jc.CATEGORY_NAME AS categoryName, r.FK_REGION_CODE AS regionCode, rg.REGION_NAME AS regionName, r.ADDRESS AS address, r.SELF_INTRO AS selfIntro, r.PHOTO_PATH AS photoPath, r.DESIRED_SALARY AS desiredSalary, r.UPLOADED_AT AS uploadedAt, r.IS_PRIMARY AS isPrimary, r.ALLOW_SCOUT AS allowScout, r.IS_DELETED AS isDeleted,
( SELECT el.EDU_LEVEL_NAME FROM TBL_RESUME_EDUCATION re LEFT JOIN TBL_EDUCATION_LEVEL el ON re.FK_EDU_LEVEL_CODE = el.EDU_LEVEL_CODE WHERE re.FK_RESUME_ID = r.RESUME_ID ORDER BY re.SORT ASC, re.GRADUATIONDATE DESC NULLS LAST FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY ) AS education,
CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TBL_RESUME_CAREER c WHERE c.FK_RESUME_ID = r.RESUME_ID ) THEN '경력 ' || ( SELECT NVL(FLOOR(SUM(MONTHS_BETWEEN(NVL(c.LEAVEDATE, SYSDATE), c.JOINDATE)) / 12), 0) FROM TBL_RESUME_CAREER c WHERE c.FK_RESUME_ID = r.RESUME_ID ) || '년' ELSE '신입' END AS career,
( SELECT LISTAGG(s.SKILL_NAME, '||') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY s.SKILL_NAME) FROM TBL_RESUME_TECHSTACK rt JOIN TBL_SKILL s ON rt.FK_SKILL_ID = s.SKILL_ID WHERE rt.FK_RESUME_ID = r.RESUME_ID ) AS techStackNamesRaw,
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_RESUME_TECHSTACK rt WHERE rt.FK_RESUME_ID = r.RESUME_ID ) AS techStackCount,
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_RESUME_PORTFOLIO p WHERE p.FK_RESUME_ID = r.RESUME_ID ) AS portfolioCount
FROM TBL_RESUME r JOIN TBL_MEMBER m ON m.MEMBERID = r.FK_MEMBERID LEFT JOIN TBL_JOB_CATEGORY jc ON jc.CATEGORY_ID = r.FK_CATEGORY_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_REGION rg ON rg.REGION_CODE = r.FK_REGION_CODE
ORDER BY ( SELECT NVL(FLOOR(SUM(MONTHS_BETWEEN(NVL(c.LEAVEDATE, SYSDATE), c.JOINDATE)) / 12), 0) FROM TBL_RESUME_CAREER c WHERE c.FK_RESUME_ID = r.RESUME_ID ) DESC, r.UPLOADED_AT DESC
ORDER BY r.DESIRED_SALARY DESC NULLS LAST, r.UPLOADED_AT DESC
ORDER BY r.UPLOADED_AT DESC
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_RESUME r JOIN TBL_MEMBER m ON m.MEMBERID = r.FK_MEMBERID LEFT JOIN TBL_JOB_CATEGORY jc ON jc.CATEGORY_ID = r.FK_CATEGORY_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_REGION rg ON rg.REGION_CODE = r.FK_REGION_CODE

SELECT R.resume_id AS resumeId, R.fk_memberid AS memberid, R.fk_category_id AS categoryId, R.fk_region_code AS regionCode, R.title AS title, R.address AS address, R.self_intro AS selfIntro, R.desired_salary AS desiredSalary, R.photo_path AS photoPath, R.write_status AS writeStatus, R.is_primary AS isPrimary, R.allow_scout AS allowScout, TO_CHAR(R.uploaded_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS uploadedAt, R.is_deleted AS isDeleted, M.name AS memberName, M.email AS memberEmail, M.phone AS memberPhone, TO_CHAR(M.birth_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS memberBirthDate, M.gender AS memberGender, JC.category_name AS categoryName, RG.region_name AS regionName
FROM tbl_resume R JOIN tbl_member M ON R.fk_memberid = M.memberid LEFT JOIN tbl_job_category JC ON R.fk_category_id = JC.category_id LEFT JOIN tbl_region RG ON R.fk_region_code = RG.region_code
WHERE R.resume_id = #{resumeId} AND R.is_deleted = 0 AND R.is_primary = 1 AND R.allow_scout = 1

SELECT E.education_id AS educationId, E.fk_resume_id AS resumeId, E.schoolname, E.major, E.fk_edu_level_code AS educationLevelCode, TO_CHAR(E.enrolldate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS enrolldate, TO_CHAR(E.graduationdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS graduationdate, E.status, E.sort, EL.edu_level_name AS educationLevelName FROM tbl_resume_education E LEFT JOIN tbl_education_level EL ON E.fk_edu_level_code = EL.edu_level_code WHERE E.fk_resume_id = #{resumeId} ORDER BY E.sort ASC, E.enrolldate DESC NULLS LAST

SELECT C.career_id AS careerId, C.fk_resume_id AS resumeId, C.companyname, C.fk_category_id AS categoryId, C.jobname_custom AS jobnameCustom, C.position, TO_CHAR(C.joindate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS joindate, TO_CHAR(C.leavedate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS leavedate, C.job_desc AS jobDesc, C.sort, JC.category_name AS categoryName FROM tbl_resume_career C LEFT JOIN tbl_job_category JC ON C.fk_category_id = JC.category_id WHERE C.fk_resume_id = #{resumeId} ORDER BY C.sort ASC, C.joindate DESC NULLS LAST

SELECT L.language_id AS languageId, L.fk_resume_id AS resumeId, L.language_name AS languageName, L.testname, L.score, TO_CHAR(L.acquired_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS acquiredDate FROM tbl_resume_language L WHERE L.fk_resume_id = #{resumeId} ORDER BY L.acquired_date DESC NULLS LAST

SELECT RC.cert_id AS certId, RC.fk_resume_id AS resumeId, RC.fk_certificate_code AS certificateCode, TO_CHAR(RC.acquired_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS acquiredDate, C.certificate_name AS certificateName, C.issuer AS issuer FROM tbl_resume_certificate RC JOIN tbl_certificate C ON RC.fk_certificate_code = C.certificate_code WHERE RC.fk_resume_id = #{resumeId} ORDER BY RC.acquired_date DESC NULLS LAST

SELECT portfolio_id AS portfolioId, fk_resume_id AS resumeId, portfolio_type AS portfolioType, link, filepath, original_filename AS originalFilename, TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS createdAt FROM tbl_resume_portfolio WHERE fk_resume_id = #{resumeId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT award_id AS awardId, fk_resume_id AS resumeId, award_name AS awardName, organization_name AS organizationName, TO_CHAR(award_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS awardDate, description FROM tbl_resume_award WHERE fk_resume_id = #{resumeId} ORDER BY award_date DESC

SELECT RT.fk_resume_id AS resumeId, RT.fk_skill_id AS skillId, RT.proficiency, S.skill_name AS skillName, SC.category_name AS categoryName FROM tbl_resume_techstack RT JOIN tbl_skill S ON RT.fk_skill_id = S.skill_id LEFT JOIN tbl_skill_category SC ON S.fk_skill_category_id = SC.skill_category_id WHERE RT.fk_resume_id = #{resumeId} ORDER BY SC.skill_category_id ASC, S.skill_name ASC
